text: Changed named feature execution to fail-fast by default across Python APIs, registry recipes, CLI workflows, benchmarks, and shipped presets; preserved explicit execution_mode=fallback and legacy strict_dependency=False. Distinguished explicit backend=none passthrough from fallback, excluded unimplemented Gentle from auto selection, bumped API_COMPAT_VERSION to 2 with migration notes, and fixed catalog tables with nowrap contract columns plus horizontal overflow. Verified 228 passed/19 skipped, Ruff, release parity for 49 public contracts, docs lint/catalog validation, 58-page Quarto render, and rendered table DOM/CSS checks.
